summary: All 3 bug fixes verified: 1) Creative preview now shows proper UI for all types - banner with image_url shows image, banner with ad_markup shows 'HTML Banner' with code icon and iframe preview, video shows play icon with duration, audio shows music icon with duration. 2) Banner creation form removed CTA Text and CTA Color fields - only has Banner Size, Image URL, Background Color. 3) Creatives sorted newest first (Latest Video → Latest Audio → Banner → Test Creative).

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: isValidUrl helper correctly detects null, 'None', empty string, and blob URLs as invalid
renderCreativeCard function properly handles all creative types with appropriate fallback UI
Banner form correctly removed ctaText and ctaColor fields from form state and UI
fetchCreatives function sorts by created_at descending (newest first)
Preview modals show proper content - image for image_url banners, iframe for ad_markup banners
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 creative-related bugs fixed and verified. Creative list shows proper preview thumbnails. Banner form has no CTA fields. Creatives are sorted newest first.

creative_list_preview_fix.description: Creative cards show proper preview for all types - no 'Missing: image_url or ad_markup' error
creative_list_preview_fix.evidence: Screenshot shows: video with play icon + 24s duration, audio with music icon + 42s duration, banner with IQOS image, HTML banner with code icon

banner_image_preview.description: Banner card shows actual image if image_url exists
banner_image_preview.evidence: Banner card shows IQOS advertisement image with 300x250 badge

banner_html_preview.description: Banner card shows 'HTML Banner' with code icon if only ad_markup exists
banner_html_preview.evidence: Test Creative card shows code icon with 'HTML Banner' text

video_preview.description: Video creative card shows play icon with duration
video_preview.evidence: Latest Video card shows play icon with '24s' and '1920x1080 • 24s' badge

audio_preview.description: Audio creative card shows music icon with duration
audio_preview.evidence: Latest Audio card shows music icon with '42s' duration

creatives_sorted_newest_first.evidence: Order in UI: Latest Video (newest) → Latest Audio → Banner → Test Creative (oldest)

banner_form_no_cta_fields.description: Banner creation form does NOT have CTA Text or CTA Color fields
banner_form_no_cta_fields.evidence: Screenshot shows Banner Settings has only: Banner Size, Image URL (or upload below), Background Color

banner_preview_no_learn_more.description: Banner live preview does NOT show 'Learn More' button
banner_preview_no_learn_more.evidence: Live Preview section shows only image placeholder, no CTA button

preview_modal_banner_with_image.description: Preview modal for banner with image_url shows proper image
preview_modal_banner_with_image.evidence: Preview: Banner modal shows IQOS ad image in Live Preview (300x250) with size badge

preview_modal_banner_with_markup.description: Preview modal for banner with ad_markup shows iframe with HTML content
preview_modal_banner_with_markup.evidence: Preview: Test Creative modal shows iframe rendering HTML content with HTML Markup code section

blob_url_detection.description: Blob URLs are correctly detected as invalid via isValidUrl helper
blob_url_detection.evidence: Code review confirms isValidUrl returns false for URLs starting with 'blob:'
